description: Style NoteA belt is an essential detail to complete your ensemble and this braided belt from baggit is made of textured synthetic leather for optimal style and durability. With a generous, adjustable Fit, cinch this fashionable belt over a dress or wrap it around those stylish skinnies!Product DetailsBraided synthetic upper and braided threadingTang clasp to offer a snug fit and to hold the belt in placeHoles with a fixed loop to customise fitMaterial and CareSyntheticUse a brass polisher to maintain buckle shineWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
